pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm walking through a museum of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore. i don't even know why i bother waking up to face the same empty rooms every single day. it feels pointless.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to care about anything lately. like, i was looking at the stars tonight and just thinking... everything we do, every single struggle, every bit of pain, it's all just going to be erased. the heat death of the universe doesn't care about my "growth" or my "goals." it's all just noise that eventually goes silent. how can anyone keep trying when the math just says it doesn't matter?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the flickering hope in my weary breast. He has gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my soul. I find myself wandering these dark corridors, feeling as though I am but a ghost already, drifting through a world that no longer has a place for me. Is there any solace, truly, in a life so utterly forsaken?

pool.baseline: honestly im just sitting here in this cafe in bali and it hit me how much of a ghost i am. like i wander around these places and i don't actually exist to anyone here. if i just stopped showing up tomorrow... i dont think anyone would even notice a gap. it feels like my life is just zero sum. i take up space but i don't actually add anything.
